name: Labs Institute
description: DJ artist management portal — contracts, gig opportunities, marketing, location-based pricing models, and DJ profiles under the Labs Institute brand.

phases.name: DJ Profiles + Roster
phases.description: DJ profiles with genre, location, rate card, availability. Roster management for the label.

phases.name: Gig Opportunities Feed
phases.description: Browse and match DJs to gig opportunities based on genre, location, and scale.

phases.name: Contracts + Booking
phases.description: Contract templates, booking workflow from inquiry to confirmation.

phases.name: Pricing Model
phases.description: Dynamic pricing based on location, event scale, DJ tier, and market data.

phases.name: Marketing + Promotion
phases.description: Marketing tools, social media integration, promotional asset management.
